title: Tiger parking district reserved streets (Sec. TPR-204(h))

side.description: Side(s) of street; common#side value or compound ('north and west'); empty if none

from_point.description: Start of the segment (strip 'a point'); empty if whole/unstated

to_point.description: End of the segment; 'end' for street's end

schedule.description: Days/times the restriction applies; lettered a)/b)/c) sub-windows joined with '; '
